scripts.dev: concurrently -n web,api -c blue,green "npm run dev -w apps/web" "npm run dev -w apps/api"
scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/db && npm run build -w apps/api && npm run build -w apps/web
scripts.db:migrate: npm run prisma -w packages/db -- migrate dev
scripts.db:seed: npm run prisma -w packages/db -- db seed
